name: Tenax International S.p.A.
summary: Tenax International S.p.A. engages in the design and production of low-voltage electric road sweepers and street washers worldwide. The company also provides pre-owned street washers and road sweepers, as well as assistance services. Its products are used in urban and metropolitan, commercial and tourist, and indoor and industrial applications. The company was founded in 2016 and is based in Rio Saliceto, Italy.
